description_long: This is a medium-sized detached house with a steep, dark gray gable roof and white exterior walls. The house features multiple dormer windows on both sides of the roof, providing additional light and space to the upper floor. There is a small, attached structure resembling a garage or shed with a sloped metal roof adjacent to the main building. The property is bordered by a paved walkway and some low shrubbery, with a small patch of grass visible on one side. The windows are symmetrically arranged, and the main entrance is located at the front, marked by a simple door and a small overhang. The overall design is practical and modest, typical of suburban or rural European residential architecture.
description: A white, two-story house with a steep gable roof, dormer windows, and an attached garage or shed. The property includes paved walkways, low shrubs, and a small grassy area.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, two dormer windows, and the attached garage or shed.
description_view_1: Left-rear view highlighting the garage/shed structure and the side of the house with additional windows.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the back of the house, more dormer windows, and a grassy patch.
description_view_3: Right-front view focusing on the side windows, shrubbery, and the transition between paved and grassy areas.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple front door with a small overhang, no porch, and minimal decorative elements
